confirm.deleteTransactions: Delete saved transactions for this account and reset the sync cursor? The next sync will re-fetch everything based on the history setting.
confirm.removeAccount: Remove this account and all its transactions?
confirm.disconnectAccount: Disconnect this account from the bank? Transactions will be kept but no new ones will be fetched on sync.

resync.title: Force resync
resync.description: Fetch transactions from a specific date, regardless of the last sync cursor.
